message:
test(bubbletea): comprehensive simulator tests and helpers (bd-ikfq)

Add helper methods for event simulation:
- sim_key(c: char) - simulate single character key press
- sim_key_type(key_type) - simulate special keys (Enter, Esc, arrows)
- sim_mouse(x, y, button, action) - simulate mouse events
- sim_resize(width, height) - simulate window resize
- sim_paste(text) - simulate bracketed paste

Add 12 new tests covering:
- Event simulation (keys, mouse, resize, paste)
- Sequence command handling
- Edge cases (empty batch, recursive updates, large queues)

Total: 22 simulator tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
